lims_api._comment: LIMS server REST API - results are pushed here after local DB write.

logger._comment: Winston log level: error | warn | info | debug. Use 'info' in production. Use 'debug' during site commissioning at Lab.
logger._retention_comment: Number of days that daily-rotated log files are kept on disk. Older files are automatically deleted by winston-daily-rotate-file.

data_retention._comment: Auto-delete database rows older than 'days'. Runs every 'interval_minutes' minutes plus once at engine startup. Set 'days' to 0 to disable cleanup entirely.
